title: SP11 9PL, Mr Howard Scruse: permit surrender issued - EPR/NP3337MU/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the decision document for:    Operator name: Mr Howard Scruse   Installation name: Oaktree Poultry Farm   Permit number: EPR/NP3337MU/S003   "
